mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, category, description, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission ORDER BY category ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT id, code, name, category, description, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY category ASC, sort_order ASC
SELECT id, code, name, category, description, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM sys_permission WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (code, name, category, description, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{category}, #{description}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET name = #{name}, category = #{category}, description = #{description}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.code, p.name, p.category, p.description, p.sort_order, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.category ASC, p.sort_order ASC
SELECT p.code FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId}
